name: Pilot Travel Center #243 — Needles
_demo_notes: Hero parking target for Miguel's hos_near_cap call. Agent offers this via lookup_parking during the Proactive Check-In.

name: Love's Travel Stop — Kingman
_demo_notes: Secondary option for Miguel if Needles is staged as full. Out of HOS range so agent would recommend Needles over this one.

name: Flying J Travel Plaza — Kingman East
_demo_notes: Third option; not used in hero scenario but realistic data for Kingman corridor.

name: Love's Travel Stop — Barstow
_demo_notes: Classic corridor parking. Used by the broker check-call agent if it needs to reference mid-route stops.

name: Love's Travel Stop — Gallup
_demo_notes: New Mexico corridor — used for John Okafor's eastbound route.
